title: The Underroot

GeoSeed_sphere_grid.narrative_form: World Tree root network as icosahedral subdivision grid
key_lines: icosahedral subdivision projected through three-dimensional earth
every junction connects to six neighbors
you can't remove one vertex without weakening the whole structure

HallPassGuidance.narrative_form: corridor warrant — live state proof that dies on transfer
key_lines: rolling cryptographic attestation that could not be paused, copied, or rewound
you can't replay a corridor. The corridor isn't the same corridor twice
failure_modes_shown: timing mismatch (stride length vs elapsed time)
witness chain broken (entry junction recorded different bearer)
corridor state drift (roots grow, moisture shifts, tongue-field changes)

quarantine_as_middle_state.narrative_form: roots tighten to hold, not harm — diagnostic not punishment

training_pipeline_echo.narrative_form: Underroot learned from past unauthorized signals — grew verification geometry as scar tissue
training_pipeline_echo.key_line: The system had learned what happened when you let anything move through your infrastructure unchecked

new_characters.Voss: courier third class, sister Sera died 8 months ago, recruited by unknown Void Seed agent to access deep junction

emotional_beats.senna_romance: Marcus reads Senna's stillness through intention-faculty, delivers Mira's message, Senna admits she carries too much
emotional_beats.kael_parallel: Voss mirrors Kael — bad solution to real problem, grief as operational motivation
emotional_beats.polly_witness: Polly notes the system isn't built to prevent unauthorized compassion

plot_threads_advanced: Void Seed recruiting living agents through grief
Deep junction connects to pre-Founding channels without governance
Senna knew Sera Voss personally — the gap is personal now
Campaign, not lone rogue — organized exploitation of dead backlog

backward.ch20: dead backlog, seventh absence, Kael's dormant infrastructure
backward.ch22: quarantine as middle state, intention dimension, Alexander's training
backward.ch18: Irondeep corridor routing, live state proofs, chained records
backward.ch19: Mira's message to Senna (continuity is not silence)

forward.ch25_council: Voss case as evidence, campaign discovery, doctrine revision
